form.formComment: Back after a long spell. Finished off last campaign 6th of 8 at this track in the G2 Tristarc on October 18 over 1400m, 5.5 len behind Abounding with 57kg at $41. First up last campaign 3rd of 10 at Flemington in the G3 Shaftesbury Ave on March 8 2025 over 1400m, 5 len behind Is It Me carrying 54kg at $12. Finished fourth in a Echuca jump-out on March 24. May need this one.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after five months 2nd of 8 at Flemington Mares Hcp on March 28 over 1100m, on a wet track; head behind Pop Award with 54.5kg at $13. Previously second-up 9th of 12 at Moonee Valley Bm84 on August 23 over 1200m, 5.5 len behind Red Hot Nicc with 57kg at $20. Suited to 1200m and rates well.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months 3rd of 8 at this track Bm96 on March 21 over 1200m, long-neck behind Meridius carrying 55kg at $17. form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after five months raced behind the speed prior to fading to run last of 9 at this track in the G3 Typhoon Tracy on March 21 over 1200m, 5 len behind Point Barrow carrying 58.5kg at $12. Previously second-up 2nd of 8 at Sandown-Hillside 2yo Hcp on July 30 over 1000m, on a slow track; 0.5 len behind Express Class carrying 56kg at $2.35. Would've liked to see a bit more fresh, take on trust.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up ran last of 8 at Cranbourne in the LR Abell Stks on February 27 over 1200m, 4.5 len behind Miss Icelandic with 54kg at $5.50. Second-up got back early 3rd in a small field at this track F&M Swp on March 14 over 1100m, 1.3 len behind Gentle Steel carrying 55kg at $6. Fitter now and making headway. Will be very hard to hold out.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Mare returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last preparation when last of 9 at Randwick F&M Bm78 November 1 over 1300m, soft track; 7 len behind Bravissima carrying 61kg at $10. First up last campaign third of 7 at Randwick Mares Bm78 (76) September 6 over 1100m, 2.75 len behind Monte Supreme with 59kg at $21. Expecting her to hit the ground running this campaign.

Could roll forward and improve quickly.
